jobName: Neo Aust - 53x53mm Lid Labels x 13 Kinds (11,000) Neo Aust - 80x80mm Front Labels x 10 Kinds Back Labels x 10 Kinds (16,000) Neo Aust - 20x230mm Tamper Labels x 10 Kinds (8,500) Neo Aust - 35x35mm Mini Jar Labels x 1 Kind (1,000) Artwork
lineDescription: Neo Aust - 80x80mm Front Labels x 10 Kinds Back Labels x 10 Kinds (16,000) Size: 80mm x 80mm Material: PP Metallic Silver Print Colour: White + CMYK Tool: D0203(6,3)(0,1)0mm Circle Provided on 76mm Cores Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE HAND APPLIED Supply: ***Rolls of 500*** SUPPLIED ON SINGLE ROLLS Qty: 16000 Berrylicious 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Bewitching Blue 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Peachy keen 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Morninga Magic 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Complexion 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Gorgeous Green 1000 x Front 1000 x Back Australiana Native 500 x Front 500 x Back Flower Power 500 x Front 500 x Back Love Potion 500 x Front 500 x Back Energy Revive 500 x Front 500 x Back ***Special Group Unit Price***
